# Local Archive Generated File Manifest

This directory is generated evidence for the uploaded `Trauma.zip` archive with SHA-256 `0286d0f25f9744cc6387e8676e9429ef11a8991bbad6bda45961f4358b534652`.

The four CSV parts together contain all 1,040 archive files in normalized path order. Every part repeats the same header and records `path`, candidate clean-repository path, byte size, SHA-256, and Git blob SHA-1.

- [`part_01.csv`](part_01.csv) — rows 1–260
- [`part_02.csv`](part_02.csv) — rows 261–520
- [`part_03.csv`](part_03.csv) — rows 521–780
- [`part_04.csv`](part_04.csv) — rows 781–1040

`gamemodes/trauma/**` receives a candidate mapping to `gamemodes/zcity/**`; this is a comparison aid, not a claim of semantic equivalence.
